title: Faithfuled Apple Skin
description: Addon for Faithful x32 with Apple Skin support
body:
About

This is an addon for Faithful x32 that adds stylized textures for Apple Skin. For the addon to work properly, it must be moved above the mod resources in the game's resource packs menu.

Usage

You are free to use this resource pack as you wish, based on moral principles. If you post this resource pack on third-party resources or include it in your modpack, please provide a link to this page.

Survey

I'm thinking of merging my addons, but I want to know your opinion, please take this survey, it's just a minute of your time.
